nodes.name: Cinnyris
nodes.summary: Cinnyris（Cinnyris）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联59种鸟类，如綠腹花蜜鳥、Western miombo sunbird、Eastern miombo sunbird等59种鸟类。

nodes.name: Purple-banded sunbird
nodes.summary: The purple-banded sunbird (Cinnyris bifasciatus) is a species of bird in the family Nectariniidae. It is found in Angola, Botswana, Republic of the Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Ethiopia, Eswatini, Gabon, Kenya, Malawi, Mozambique, Namibia, Rwanda, Somalia, South Africa, Tanzania, Uganda, Zambia, and Zimbabwe. The Tsavo sunbird, sometimes lumped with the purple-banded, is here considered a separate species. References External links Purple-banded sunbird - Species text in The Atlas of Southern African Birds.
